The '''2017 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 92nd season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 10th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2017 Super League season|2017 Super League]] and the [[2017 Challenge Cup]].

=== Dual registration ===

Castleford also agreed dual registration partnerships with the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship]] and [[Oxford Rugby League|Oxford]] in [[RFL League 1|League 1]].<ref>{{cite tweet|author=Castleford Tigers|author-link=Castleford Tigers|user=CTRLFC|number=855801452224290816|title=Best of luck @Jybees and good luck to our dual reg club @BatleyRLFC}}</ref><ref>{{cite tweet|author=Castleford Tigers|author-link=Castleford Tigers|user=CTRLFC|number=809753223343075328|title=Castleford Tigers continue dual registration partnership with @Oxford_RL}}</ref>

{{notelist}}
